Off Calendar Sep-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-26-2014 Continued To Sep-09-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Holsman for Kathleen Boyce.

The Court suggested treating the funeral costs as an expense rather than a creditor's claim, expressed concern about the funds going to the Minor in Illinois and stated that it would like to see a bond or the funds placed into a blocked account. The Court also noted that there are no receipts for the $833.00. The accounting petition was continued to September 9, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of declaration addressing the above.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-12-2014 Continued To Aug-26-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (215 Missouri Street, San Francisco, Ca 94104)
Off Calendar Sep-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Holsman for kathleen Boyce (Administrator).

The sale was confirmed at $894,050.00. The amount of the additional bond is to be determined by Counsel. The Court granted the petition, (subject to the written order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith./J. Shannon.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Issue Regarding Appointment Of The Guardian Of The Minor'S Estate
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator ("SFPA"). William Holsman for Kathleen Boyce (Petitioner).

Mr. Holsman stated that he was not able to get the Mother of the Minor to file a guardianship petition, that the Mother would be nominating the Grandmother to be appointed and asked the Court to appoint Ms. Boyce, (Grandmother) as the Administrator as she had already made arrangements to maintain the home. Mr. Ferdon asked who would fund the estate if the SFPA came in, stated that there was no immediacy and asked if Mr. Holsman's Client was prepared to be appointed as Special Administrator. The Court granted the petition appointing Kathleen Boyce as the Administrator, (signing the order for the same in open court). The bond was set at $20,000.00. Status on the issue regarding appointment of the Guardian of the Minor's estate was set for April 1, 2009.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Shannon.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-06-2009 Continued To Jan-27-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
